rulings.Case Title: ROCHELLE VAUGHN et al VS. WALTER WORSHAM
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 4, 2015 line 3. DEFENDANT WALTER WORSHAM's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT DENIED.= (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: ROCHELLE VAUGHN et al VS. WALTER WORSHAM
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 4, 2015 line 3. DEFENDANT WALTER WORSHAM's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the 1st, 7th and 9th causes of action. Demurer is otherwise overruled. The 2008 release is of past occurrences only and it would be illegal to seek to contractually bar future habitability claims in any event; alternative theories of liability may be pleaded. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: ANDREA MAYFIELD et al VS. BALDWIN FRANK MYERS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Demurrer Of Peter Bonis To First Amended Cross Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 4, 2015 line 4. Demurrer Of Peter Bonis To First Amended Cross Complaint SUSTAINED. Demurrer is sustained as to the first cause of action. Non-opposition filed. Demurrer is SUSTAINED as to the second cause of action with 10 day leave to amend for cross-complainant to allege in clear and concise language all elements of the "violation of Civil Code 51-52" cause of action as to defendant Bonis. = (501/RBU)
